visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair wearing a black pajama shirt and an older man with glasses and a gray t-shirt sit on a blue sofa. The woman holds a large green bag of Doritos Coriander flavor up to the camera. The background is an indoor living room with a framed picture on the wall. (2) The woman gestures towards the bag while speaking excitedly, and the man looks at the bag with curiosity. They are in a bright, evenly lit indoor setting. (3) The woman holds the bag open to the camera, showing green-colored triangular tortilla chips. She has a wide-eyed, surprised expression. The man leans in to see. (4) Both characters take a chip and eat it. The woman chews thoughtfully while the man smiles and continues to chew. They are framed in a medium shot. (5) The woman offers a chip to someone off-camera, and a hand appears to take it. The man starts eating more chips from the bag quite happily, while the woman looks at him and laughs. (6) The man gives a rating with his fingers while holding the green bag. The woman continues to react with exaggerated facial expressions as they finish the video.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 韓國爸爸吃. [Variety]: 香菜多力多滋的反應. (2) [Subtitle]: 猜看看是什麼口味. (3) [Subtitle]: 豆裡豆子?. [Variety]: (100%韓國人). (4) [Subtitle]: 是芥末!!!. (5) [Subtitle]: 是「香菜」. (6) [Subtitle]: 你看過香菜口味餅乾嗎?. (7) [Subtitle]: 沒有.... (8) [Subtitle]: 這個近期在台灣很紅，很難買. (9) [Subtitle]: 在便利商店一直售罄. (10) [Subtitle]: 因為我爸在台灣吃東西的時候. (11) [Subtitle]: 也蠻喜歡配香菜一起吃. (12) [Subtitle]: 所以今天來. (13) [Subtitle]: 評價這個看看. (14) [Subtitle]: 先打開!. (15) [Variety]: (碎碎念). [Subtitle]: 香菜該要配肉啊. (16) [Subtitle]: 香味還行欸?. (17) [Variety]: 😲. [Subtitle]: 超綠. (18) [Subtitle]: 是芥末口味吧.... (19) [Variety]: !!. [Subtitle]: 香菜味蠻明顯. (20) [Subtitle]: 真的是香菜口味欸. (21) [Variety]: (反正吃得很好). (22) [Subtitle]: 不敢吃香菜的人會討厭吧. (23) [Subtitle]: 媽媽：我真不喜歡香菜. (24) [Variety]: (媽媽來挑戰). (25) [Variety]: 啊啊啊. [Subtitle]: 媽媽：我不行!!!!. (26) [Subtitle]: 爸爸吃得很好.... (27) [Subtitle]: 可以下酒菜對吧?. (28) [Subtitle]: 媽媽：好吃嗎?. (29) [Subtitle]: 還不錯啦?!. (30) [Subtitle]: 鹹鹹的~. (31) [Subtitle]: 我的菜. (32) [Subtitle]: 那5分滿分給幾分呢?. (33) [Variety]: (傻眼). [Subtitle]: 然後繼續吃.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator and her father as the co-star.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The woman has long black hair, fair skin, and wears a black button-up pajama set. The man has short black hair, wears glasses, and a gray t-shirt with text on it.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic living room with a blue fabric sofa, a white wall, a framed picture, and a decorative pillow with 'Green Leaves' text.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a high-energy female voice speaking fast Korean, accompanied by a bouncy, upbeat electronic BGM with a clear 4/4 beat. A male voice interjects with a lower pitch. (2) A sharp 'crinkle' and 'pop' sound of a plastic bag opening triggers a brief pause in speech, followed by the female's excited 'Oh!'. (3) Loud, crisp 'crunch' sounds of eating chips occur repeatedly. The BGM remains steady. The female voice exhibits high pitch variability and laughter. (4) A sudden, loud, high-pitched female scream of disgust occurs from off-camera, accompanied by a cartoonish 'boing' sound effect. The main female speaker laughs hysterically. (5) The male speaker continues to speak in a calm, melodic Korean tone, punctuated by more crunching sounds. A 'ding' sound effect signifies the rating moment. (6) The video concludes with overlapping laughter, rapid speech, and the continuous bouncy BGM fading slightly at the very end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Opening Bag -> Tasting -> External Reaction -> Final Rating
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to entertain viewers by showing a father's reaction to a uniquely flavored snack (Coriander Doritos), leveraging the contrast between his liking of it and the mother's intense dislike.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video prominently features a specific, trending flavor of Doritos, showing the packaging and the product being consumed with a positive reaction from the father.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The use of high-energy Korean dialogue paired with Chinese subtitles suggests an cross-cultural appeal. The fast-paced editing and variety-style captions are characteristic of short-form social media trends.
